sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The player moved along the path. Let me check the current position and see if we're close to the blue circle now. I need to continue moving toward the blue circle.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and remaining dots
player_pos = None
gray_dots = []
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 9:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = sum(r for r,c in b) // len(b)
        c = sum(c for r,c in b) // len(b)
        player_pos = (r, c)
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        gray_dots.append(n['boundary'][0])

print(f"Player at: {player_pos}")
print(f"Remaining gray dots: {gray_dots}")

# Dots ahead (lower row, higher col)
if player_pos:
    ahead = [p for p in gray_dots if p[0] < player_pos[0] and p[1] > player_pos[1]]
    ahead.sort(key=lambda p: p[0])
    print(f"Dots ahead: {ahead}")
    if ahead:
        actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in ahead]
        action(actions)
    else:
        print("No more dots ahead, player may be at/near the blue circle")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
